itinerary.title: Marina Bay Luxury Tour
itinerary.overview:
04 Nights / 05 Days Ultra-Luxury Marina Bay Expedition SERIAL CODE: SG-012 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-SIN-MAR-2026 STATE / COUNTRY: Singapore CATEGORY: Ultra-Luxury Marina Bay Tour Package DURATION: 04 Nights / 05 Days Marina Bay Luxury

TOUR OVERVIEW
Indulge in the absolute height of elegance at the heart of Singapore. This TRAGUIN curated luxury expedition centers around the iconic Marina Bay, offering opulent stays at the world-famous Marina Bay Sands, private yacht excursions, and elite Michelin-starred culinary experiences, ensuring unforgettable memories. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_title: SG-012 | Marina Bay Luxury Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 04 Nights / 05 Days Singapore package (SG-012 / TRG-SIN-MAR-2026): Marina Bay Sands • Private Yacht • Michelin Dining • Exclusive City Sojourn with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

highlights.text: Day 01: VIP ARRIVAL & MARINA BAY CHECK-IN

days.title: VIP ARRIVAL & MARINA BAY CHECK-IN
days.description: Arrive in Singapore. VIP chauffeur transfer to Marina Bay Sands. Check into your ultra-luxury suite and enjoy a welcome cocktail overlooking the bay.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: SKYPARK & EXCLUSIVE DINING
days.description: Access the exclusive Sands SkyPark. Enjoy a private gourmet dinner at one of the bay’s premier Michelin- starred restaurants.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: PRIVATE YACHT SOJOURN
days.description: Embark on a private yacht cruise around the Singapore Harbour, experiencing the city’s skyline from an exclusive experience point of view.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: LEISURE & ARTISTIC DISCOVERY
days.description: Enjoy a leisurely day of private shopping at luxury boutiques or artistic visits in the Marina Bay area, creating unforgettable memories.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final luxury breakfast before your TRAGUIN private chauffeur transfer to the airport, concluding your premium Marina Bay luxury expedition.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.
